description_long: This is a large, modern bungalow set on a landscaped plot with a driveway leading to the main entrance. The structure features a flat, multi-level roof design with several overhangs and terraces, and a mix of white, gray, and orange exterior finishes. Large windows and glass doors are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, providing ample natural light and views of the surrounding greenery. The building includes multiple outdoor spaces, such as balconies and patios, some with visible planters and seating areas. The property is surrounded by a green lawn and bordered by a dark retaining wall, with paved walkways connecting different sections. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and integration with the landscape.
description: A modern, multi-level bungalow with flat roofs, large windows, and outdoor terraces, set on a landscaped plot with a driveway and green lawn.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the main entrance, driveway, and prominent flat roof overhangs with visible terraces and planters.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway approach, multiple balconies, and the asymmetrical arrangement of windows and outdoor spaces.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the extended flat roof, large windows, and a long patio area with greenery along the facade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the building's depth, additional terraces, and the integration of the structure with the sloped landscape.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
